summary: Tested ML-based Seasonal Analysis module. All 32 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests verified: sidebar renamed to 'Analytics & ML', 8 sub-tabs present, PMS Final has correct columns (PMS, Silver Score, Labour Score, Balanced), Demand tab has forecast columns, Procurement tab has Buy/Hold badges, Dead Stock tab shows classification. Profit Analysis page unchanged and working. Old seasonal tab removed from DataVisualization.
critical_code_review_comments: All seasonal endpoints correctly reject non-admin users with 403
PMS balanced formula verified: balanced_score = 0.5*(silver_score + labour_score) + 0.5*min(silver_score, labour_score)
Segmentation logic correctly assigns: dense_daily (180+ days, 500+ lines), medium_daily (60+ days, 100+ lines), weekly_sparse (20+ days), cold_start (below thresholds)
Silver MCX features are non-blocking - service continues if metals.live is unavailable
Profit endpoint /api/analytics/profit unchanged and returns expected fields
Frontend correctly shows 8 sub-tabs: PMS Final, PMS Silver, PMS Labour, Demand, Seasonality, Procurement, Supplier, Dead Stock
Sidebar correctly renamed from 'Analytics & AI' to 'Analytics & ML' (line 98 in Layout.jsx)
DataVisualization page no longer has Seasonal tab
seed_data_creation: Seasonal ML computation cached with 370 items (76 weekly_sparse, 294 cold_start)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seasonal ML module fully tested. 370 items segmented from 11767 transactions. All 8 endpoints working: /seasonal/compute, /seasonal/pms-final, /seasonal/pms-silver, /seasonal/pms-labour, /seasonal/demand-forecast, /seasonal/seasonality, /seasonal/procurement, /seasonal/supplier-view, /seasonal/dead-stock. Executive users see the page but get 'No items found' because API returns 403.

profit_endpoint_unchanged.description: GET /api/analytics/profit returns profit data with silver_profit_kg, labor_profit_inr, all_items

seasonal_compute_works.description: POST /api/seasonal/compute returns summary with total_items and segments_summary
seasonal_compute_works.evidence: Backend test passed - total_items: 370, segments: weekly_sparse: 76, cold_start: 294

pms_final_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/pms-final returns items with pms, silver_score, labour_score, balanced_score

pms_silver_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/pms-silver returns items ranked by silver PMS

pms_labour_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/pms-labour returns items ranked by labour PMS

demand_forecast_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/demand-forecast returns items with forecast_14d, forecast_30d, confidence, segment

seasonality_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/seasonality returns items with monthly_profile and peak_months

procurement_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/procurement returns items with action (buy/hold), reason_code, suggested_qty_g

dead_stock_endpoint.description: GET /api/seasonal/dead-stock returns dead_stock and slow_mover items

non_admin_rejection.description: All seasonal endpoints reject non-admin users with 403
non_admin_rejection.evidence: 12 backend tests passed for 403 rejection (one per endpoint)

sidebar_renamed.description: Sidebar shows 'Analytics & ML' instead of 'Analytics & AI'
sidebar_renamed.evidence: Playwright test - sidebar shows 'ANALYTICS & ML' group

datavisualization_no_seasonal.description: DataVisualization page does NOT have a Seasonal tab
datavisualization_no_seasonal.evidence: Playwright test - no tab-seasonal found in DataVisualization

seasonal_page_8_tabs.evidence: Playwright test - found all 8 tabs: pms-final, pms-silver, pms-labour, demand, seasonality, procurement, supplier, dead-stock

pms_final_columns.description: PMS Final tab shows table with PMS, Silver Score, Labour Score, Balanced Score columns
pms_final_columns.evidence: Playwright test - found all 4 required columns

demand_columns.description: Demand tab shows forecast_14d and forecast_30d columns
demand_columns.evidence: Playwright test - found 14d and 30d in page content

procurement_badges.description: Procurement tab shows Buy/Hold badges and reason codes
procurement_badges.evidence: Playwright test - found Buy/Hold in page content

dead_stock_classification.description: Dead Stock tab shows dead_stock/slow_mover classification
dead_stock_classification.evidence: Playwright test - found Dead Stock and Slow Mover badges

run_analysis_button.evidence: Playwright test - clicked button, summary cards appeared

search_box.description: Search box filters items in all tabs

profit_page_unchanged.description: Existing Profit Analysis page /profit is unchanged and works
profit_page_unchanged.evidence: Playwright test - page loads with Silver Profit and Labour Profit cards
